title: salvia glutinosa subsp. nubicola
intro: Salvia glutinosa subsp. nubicola, also known as Chinese sage, is a subspecies of perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and antispasmodic effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Salvia glutinosa subsp. nubicola include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural antiseptic. Salvia glutinosa subsp. nubicola can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
